description: Lists Microsoft Teams (team-enabled Microsoft 365 groups) via Microsoft Graph. The JSON body includes @odata.nextLink when more pages exist—pass that exact string back as odata_next_link on the next call. Optional $top via top on the first request only.

odata_next_link.description: Pagination: copy the full @odata.nextLink value from the previous response body (verbatim). When set, top is ignored; Graph encodes the continuation in the URL.

top.description: First-page page size ($top). Ignored when odata_next_link is provided.
